subject: early Christmas gift from me and Leila
body:
Mozination -

I spent a lot of time making something for you. It's now ready.

"$100M Scaling is now live"

After 14 years, this is my master framework for scaling a company from 0 to $100M.

It just went live. It's free. Enjoy.

Your biggest fan,

Alex

P.S - I hope you get as much out of it as Leila and I put into it. Since I didn't make my next book available to you this year, this is me making it up to you.
